human_review_items.summary: authoring/inventory.md:165 (Format in) and :172 (Overture themes) still credit this task with `buildings.building_part`; thesis line 1089 (<overture-theme-table> aggregate) does the same. The reference queries only `buildings.building` (+ `divisions.division_area`). Drop `buildings.building_part` from the inventory row, the format-in line, and the thesis aggregate, OR (less likely intended for a flood-risk footprint roll-up) extend the reference to query building parts (which would require regenerating reference outputs, re-checking broken sets, and a version bump). Carried over from all six prior evaluator passes; not a weighting HR.
